network_summary: Dr. Aroon Pal, DMD (SIU School of Dental Medicine 1991) is a licensed general dentist and the named authorized official across 4 Chicagoland GP locations in 4 ZIPs (60402, 60451, 60624, 60632). His personal ownership is clearly documented at two locations: Brighton Park Dental (4441 S Kedzie, Chicago 60632) where he and wife Richa Pal are confirmed owners, and PALDENTAL GROUP, PC / Lifetime Family Dental (1890 Silver Cross Blvd, New Lenox 60451) where he is the owner-operator. These two constitute a private dentist-owned multi-location group with no documentary MSO/PE layer. The other two AO-cluster locations are already-classified DSO entities: Lawndale Dental, P.C. (60624) is the friendly-PC wrapper for Dental 360 (a 15+ location Illinois DSO brand with its own management company); Berwyn Family Dental (60402) was a now-closed practice at 7001 Ogden Ave that converted to Webster Dental Care of Berwyn (Webster Dental Management, a multi-location DSO). Pal's AO role on those two locations is consistent with his being the licensed dentist/PC-holder serving as the state-law compliance AO for the DSO management entities — not the DSO owner himself. Each location is classified independently below.

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Two of the four AO-cluster locations are NOT Pal's private practice: (1) Berwyn Family Dental (60402) is a stale/closed entity — the address at 7001 Ogden Ave Berwyn is now operated as Webster Dental Care of Berwyn (Webster Dental Management DSO); Pal's AO role is as prior licensed PC-holder or billing contact, not current owner of Webster. (2) Lawndale Dental, P.C. (60624) at 3600 W Roosevelt is operating as a Dental 360 branded location; Pal is AO as the friendly-PC licensed dentist, not the DSO management owner. The EVENLY ORTHODONTICS DUPONT parent_company tag on Brighton Park Dental (60632) is a known false-positive (Evenly Technologies placeholder EIN per 2026-06-12 demotions) — Brighton Park Dental is independently owned by Pal.
evidence_chain: AO signal: AROON PAL listed as authorized official on 4 NPI org records across ZIPs 60402, 60451, 60624, 60632. Documentary corroboration: (1) brightonparkdental.com About Us confirms 'Aroon and Richa Pal — Owner' at 4441 S Kedzie Ave, Chicago 60632 (Brighton Park Dental); (2) lifetimefamilydentist.com confirms Dr. Aroon Pal as founder/owner at 1890 Silver Cross Blvd New Lenox 60451 (PALDENTAL GROUP PC / Lifetime Family Dental). These two are a private dentist_multi group. For the DSO locations: dental360grp.com/locations/lawndale-dental-center/ and dental360usa.com confirm 3600 W Roosevelt is a Dental 360 managed location (Lawndale Dental Center) — Pal is the friendly-PC AO; and webdentalchicago.com/locations/berwyn/ confirms 7001 Ogden Ave is now Webster Dental Care of Berwyn (Webster Dental Management) while Yelp marks Berwyn Family Dental Center at same address as CLOSED.
future_app_notes: Downstream gate should split this AO cluster: Brighton Park Dental (60632) and PALDENTAL GROUP/Lifetime Family Dental (60451) are Pal's private dentist_multi — promote both to ready_for_validation if not already corporate. Lawndale Dental PC (60624) is already entity_classification=dso_regional/Dental 360 — Pal is AO as friendly-PC holder only, not the DSO owner; do not reclassify this as dentist_multi. Berwyn Family Dental (60402) is already entity_classification=dso_national/Webster Dental Management and the consumer location is now Webster Dental Care of Berwyn; Berwyn Family Dental NPI may be a stale/closed shell — flag for stale review. The EVENLY parent_company tag on Brighton Park 60632 should already be removed per 2026-06-12 demotions audit.
